last_item: Band C: Badge family (Badge/ReadOnlyBadge/ResultBadge) → shadcn Badge. Extended badge.tsx cva with success/warning/info variants backed by new @theme tokens (alias legacy --ok/--warn/--info); ui.tsx maps tone→variant over <ShadcnBadge>, public API + callsites unchanged; deleted dead .badge* CSS; migrated ui.test.tsx to data-variant asserts. Reviewer fix: ReadOnlyBadge outline→info to keep it prominent.
last_result: green: typecheck, 93 web tests, build, go build. Next in band C: Alert family (Callout/ErrorNotice/StaleBanner) → shadcn Alert, then Spinner → shadcn Spinner. Then Modal→Dialog, ConfirmDialog→AlertDialog, Toast→sonner. Deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft (logged in backlog).
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
